AMD.reasoning: MACRO REGIME: Mixed-to-cautious with AI tailwind intact but amplifying headwinds. Fed held at 3.5%-3.75% for the third consecutive time on April 29 — no cuts priced through 2026. US-Iran military blockade is the dominant left-tail risk: an oil spike would re-accelerate inflation and force the Fed further out. Meta's -9% capex shock injects near-term uncertainty into the AI hardware sector. S&P gained ~9% in April (best month since 2020) but Dow is on a 5-day losing streak; regime reads as transitional, not cleanly risk-on. AMD earnings is explicitly flagged in the macro regime page as a near-term binary risk read-through — entering a position with earnings binary risk overhead is a capital preservation flag. RELATIVE STRENGTH: AMD has dramatically outperformed the broad market — ROC 21d of +74.26% vs an S&P that is roughly flat on the week. This is extreme sector-inflow momentum. Price is 52.6% above the 50-SMA and 68.5% above the 200-SMA, with ADX at 74.94 (very strong trend). However, hourly ADX has collapsed to 17.25 (weak) — momentum is decelerating on the short timeframe even as daily indicators remain elevated. This divergence between daily and hourly trend strength suggests the move is late, not early, in the rotation cycle. ASYMMETRIC R/R MATH: Current price $354.49. Upside to Fib 1.272 extension ($399.06) = +12.5%. Downside to nearest hourly support ($328.81) = -7.2%. R/R = 1.74:1 — below the 2:1 minimum threshold. Tightening the stop to the EMA-5 region (~$335) improves R/R slightly but still does not clear 2:1. Using a deeper stop at $310 (volume-confirmed hourly support) = -12.6% downside vs +12.5% upside = 1:1, unacceptable. No entry level tested delivers clean 2:1+ asymmetry given the extreme extension. CAPITAL PRESERVATION FLAGS: RSI-14 at 83.06 and RSI-21 at 86.46 are in severely overbought territory. ATR at 4.9% daily creates wide required stops that destroy R/R. Z-score vs 50-day at 2.6 standard deviations signals statistical exhaustion. AMD is +74% in 21 days — this is late in the sector rotation cycle, not early entry. Bollinger pct_b at 0.929 confirms price is near upper band. Wiki thesis confirms AMD 'consistently trades at extreme valuations that create binary risk around catalysts' — the system has seen this pattern repeatedly. VERDICT: Macro regime is not cleanly risk-on (transitional), AMD is statistically and technically overbought, R/R asymmetry is below minimum threshold at any viable stop level, and earnings binary risk is imminent. Pass. Wait for a pullback to the $310-$328 zone where R/R resets above 2:1 and earnings risk is resolved.
